title: Punctuation basics: . , ? !
text: Hi! How are you? I'm great. Look at this. Wow! That's cool. Really? Yes, really. Wait, what? No way!
tips: Period and comma are home-row pinky (right)
Question mark and exclaim need Shift
Sentence-end punctuation is in 90% of writing

character_tips.anna: Four essential punctuation marks. Together they cover most writing.
character_tips.maxim: Punctuation is rhythm structure. Master it = master prose.
character_tips.klavochka: Tiny dots and dashes, my dear — they give words life 💝
